# awesome-gbb

> Microsoft AI Apps GBB Copilot skills + plugins for Azure AI, Microsoft Foundry, and governance.

## Skills

### 🏗️ Foundry Building Blocks

- [foundry-prompt-agents](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/foundry-prompt-agents/SKILL.md): Create and manage Foundry prompt agents — declarative agents that combine a model, instructions, and tools without containers or custom code.
- [foundry-hosted-agents](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/foundry-hosted-agents/SKILL.md): Deploy + manage Foundry hosted agents — container deploy via unified azure.yaml is GA; source-code --deploy-mode code is still preview.
- [foundry-teams-bot](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/foundry-teams-bot/SKILL.md): Connect a Microsoft Foundry Hosted Agent to Microsoft Teams — generate the bot code, Bicep infrastructure, Teams manifest, and ACA deployment.
- [ghcp-hosted-agents](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/ghcp-hosted-agents/SKILL.md): Deploy Foundry hosted agents using GitHub Copilot SDK (GHCP) with BYOK authentication and Invocations protocol.
- [foundry-mcp-aca](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/foundry-mcp-aca/SKILL.md): Deploy custom MCP servers as Azure Container Apps or Azure Functions for use with Foundry hosted agents.
- [foundry-evals](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/foundry-evals/SKILL.md): Evaluate Foundry hosted agents using the two-phase invoke+score pattern and Foundry built-in evaluators.
- [foundry-iq](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/foundry-iq/SKILL.md): Build enterprise RAG with Foundry IQ and Azure AI Search Knowledge Bases using agentic retrieval, multi-hop reasoning, query planning, and citation-backed responses.
- [foundry-doc-vision-speech](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/foundry-doc-vision-speech/SKILL.md): Add vision (gpt-5.4 family), Document Intelligence v4, and Azure Speech (STT/TTS) capabilities to a Foundry hosted agent.
- [foundry-observability](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/foundry-observability/SKILL.md): End-to-end observability for Azure AI pilots — App Insights + Log Analytics + OpenTelemetry across hosted agents, ACA MCP servers, ACA jobs, bot service, workspace UIs.
- [foundry-cross-resource](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/foundry-cross-resource/SKILL.md): Cross-resource model invocation in Microsoft Foundry via an Azure APIM AI Gateway, using the `connectionName/deploymentName` model string.
- [foundry-vnet-deploy](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/foundry-vnet-deploy/SKILL.md): Deploy Azure AI Foundry with **Agent Setup inside a private VNet** — the `15-private-network-standard-agent-setup` Bicep reference architecture.
- [foundry-caphost-lifecycle](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/foundry-caphost-lifecycle/SKILL.md): Day-2 lifecycle of Microsoft Foundry capability hosts — the operational layer on top of MS Learn's create-only guidance.
- [foundry-toolbox](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/foundry-toolbox/SKILL.md): Use Microsoft Foundry Toolbox GA to manage versioned multi-tool bundles behind a single MCP endpoint and connect them to hosted agents.
- [foundry-skill-catalog](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/foundry-skill-catalog/SKILL.md): Centrally store and distribute instruction-only `SKILL.md` files via the Foundry **Skills** REST API (`{project}/skills`) — and consume them at runtime from MAF agents through a custom `SkillsSource` adapter.
- [foundry-memory](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/foundry-memory/SKILL.md): Use Azure AI Foundry Memory Store for persistent agent memory across sessions: user profiles, chat summaries, procedural memory, semantic memory retrieval, hosted-agent memory…
- [foundry-routines](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/foundry-routines/SKILL.md): Schedule and dispatch Foundry agent invocations via Routines — declarative automation rules that fire on cron (schedule trigger) or at a specific time (timer trigger).
- [foundry-voice-live](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/foundry-voice-live/SKILL.md): Build real-time voice agents on Azure AI Foundry Voice Live (GA 2026-04-10).

### 🛠️ Cross-Cutting Helpers

- [azd-patterns](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/azd-patterns/SKILL.md): Tips and patterns for Azure Developer CLI (azd) workflows, ACA job deployment, and infrastructure scripting conventions.
- [azure-tenant-isolation](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/azure-tenant-isolation/SKILL.md): Multi-tenant Azure CLI and AZD isolation for concurrent terminal sessions.
- [azure-monitor-alert-baseline](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/azure-monitor-alert-baseline/SKILL.md): Probes Azure Monitor metric alert rules in a resource-group scope against one of three published baselines (foundry_pilot, spoke_minimum, production), returning a spec §4.3.1…
- [azure-backup-readiness](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/azure-backup-readiness/SKILL.md): Audit Azure backup coverage at resource-group scope.
- [azure-resource-diagnostics](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/azure-resource-diagnostics/SKILL.md): Audit Azure diagnostic-settings coverage at resource-group scope.
- [foundry-cost-monitoring](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/foundry-cost-monitoring/SKILL.md): Continuous Foundry token-cost monitoring, chargeback, budget alerts, and FinOps automation.
- [foundry-network-runbook](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/foundry-network-runbook/SKILL.md): Operational runbook for diagnosing Microsoft Foundry **network-layer** failures after a deploy succeeds — DNS, VNet peering, NSG / Azure Firewall denies, RBAC scope, capability…
- [gbb-humanizer](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/gbb-humanizer/SKILL.md): Remove signs of AI-generated writing from prose.
- [ghcp-cli-config](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/ghcp-cli-config/SKILL.md): Bootstrap GitHub Copilot CLI for GBB workflows: 6 recommended MCP servers (mslearn, Azure, Playwright, context7, tavily, mem0), settings.json baseline (model, sessionSync,…
- [paygo-ptu-cost-analyzer](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/paygo-ptu-cost-analyzer/SKILL.md): Headless Azure OpenAI PAYGO-vs-PTU cost analysis and sizing report.

### 🛡️ Governance

- [citadel-hub-deploy](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/citadel-hub-deploy/SKILL.md): Deploy the **AI Citadel Governance Hub** (Layer 1) — APIM AI Gateway, Microsoft Foundry control plane, telemetry, 4 LLM APIs (Azure OpenAI, OpenAI Realtime, Universal LLM, Unified…
- [citadel-spoke-onboarding](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/citadel-spoke-onboarding/SKILL.md): Onboard a Foundry project as a spoke into an AI Citadel Governance Hub.
- [foundry-agt](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/foundry-agt/SKILL.md): Wrap the Microsoft Agent Governance Toolkit (AGT) around Foundry hosted agents, MCP servers, and Citadel spokes.
- [foundry-rbac-audit](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/foundry-rbac-audit/SKILL.md): Probes Azure RBAC role assignments at a resource-group scope for privilege-escalation risks (Owner, User Access Administrator, RBAC Administrator).
- [azure-sre-agent](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/azure-sre-agent/SKILL.md): Adopt Azure SRE Agent (Microsoft.App/agents) in GBB engagements without rebuilding what Microsoft already ships.

### 📊 Content Generation

- [gbb-pptx](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/gbb-pptx/SKILL.md): Generate professional PowerPoint (PPTX) presentations using python-pptx (the AI Apps GBB dark/light pitch-deck generator).
- [auto-demo-producer](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/auto-demo-producer/SKILL.md): Produce narrated video demos of web applications automatically.

### 🔍 Discovery

- [ip-catalog](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/skills/ip-catalog/SKILL.md): Discover AI Apps GBB IP catalog via MCP server.

## Plugins

- [awesome-gbb](https://github.com/aiappsgbb/awesome-gbb/blob/main/plugins/awesome-gbb/plugin.json): Microsoft AI Apps GBB skills catalog — 35 reusable building blocks for Copilot-assisted engagements.
